metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the travel-and-expense-management domain.

rootGroups.name: Employee Spend Capture
rootGroups.description: Employee-facing submission and evidence capture capabilities.

bricks.name: Receipt Capture and OCR
bricks.description: Captures receipt images and extracts merchant, amount, date, currency, and tax data into structured expense records.

internalModules.title: Receipt ingestion service
internalModules.description: Stores receipt images and manages upload flows.

internalModules.title: Extraction and normalization engine
internalModules.description: Extracts key fields and normalizes merchant and currency data.

interfaces.title: Receipt scan UI
interfaces.description: Mobile and web capture flow for receipt submission.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.
Writes or updates Transaction during domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Receipt Capture And Ocr.

bricks.name: Mobile Expense Submission
bricks.description: Mobile-first workflows for creating, editing, approving, and tracking expenses and trips.

internalModules.title: Mobile submission flow
internalModules.description: Coordinates mobile capture, draft saving, and claim submission.

interfaces.title: Mobile app surfaces
interfaces.description: Employee and manager mobile workflow surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses extracted receipt fields inside mobile submission.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.
Writes or updates Transaction during domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Reads Approval Workflow Orchestration to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Expense Form and Report Builder
bricks.description: Builds compliant expense lines and reports with configurable fields, report structure, and validations.

internalModules.title: Report composition service
internalModules.description: Manages claim drafts, expense lines, and report assembly.

interfaces.title: Expense form UI
interfaces.description: Web and mobile interface for editing claims and reports.

brickDependencies.description: Uses category and coding suggestions during report creation.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.
Writes or updates Transaction during domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Mileage and Per Diem Engine
bricks.description: Calculates compliant mileage and per diem claims using country and policy-aware rules.

internalModules.title: Rate rules engine
internalModules.description: Computes mileage and allowance values by policy and geography.

interfaces.title: Mileage and allowance API
interfaces.description: Returns computed trip allowances and reimbursable values.

brickDependencies.description: Uses travel policy parameters and thresholds.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Mileage And Per Diem.
Reads Policy Rules to support domain workflows.
Reads Trip Policy Guardrails to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Spend Categorization and Tax Coding
bricks.description: Maps spend records into categories, tax treatment, and accounting dimensions.

internalModules.title: Classification model
internalModules.description: Assigns spend category, tax hints, and accounting dimensions.

interfaces.title: Coding suggestion API
interfaces.description: Provides category and tax-coding recommendations to other flows.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Customer Profile.
Writes or updates Customer Contact Point during domain workflows.
Reads Consent Record to support domain workflows.
Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.

rootGroups.name: Policy and Approval Control
rootGroups.description: Spend policy, approval, and governance capabilities.

bricks.name: Policy Rules Engine
bricks.description: Applies configurable spend and trip policy by entity, team, traveler, merchant, amount, and route.

internalModules.title: Policy configuration model
internalModules.description: Stores policy rules, thresholds, and exceptions.

internalModules.title: Real-time policy evaluator
internalModules.description: Computes policy outcomes during submission, booking, and review.

interfaces.title: Policy admin UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for configuring policy by entity and team.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Policy Rules.
Reads Trip Policy Guardrails to support domain workflows.
Reads Spend Categorization And Tax Coding to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Smart Audit and Risk Scoring
bricks.description: Prioritizes finance and manager attention by scoring expense, trip, and card events for duplicate, policy, and fraud risk.

internalModules.title: Audit scoring engine
internalModules.description: Assigns risk and audit priority to submitted spend items.

interfaces.title: Audit review workspace
interfaces.description: Finance-facing workspace for reviewing flagged claims.

brickDependencies.description: Uses policy outcomes as core risk signals.
Links risk decisions to stored receipt and approval evidence.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.
Writes or updates Transaction during domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Smart Audit And Risk Scoring.

bricks.name: Approval Workflow Orchestration
bricks.description: Routes spend and trip approvals by manager, budget owner, entity, policy severity, and trip type.

internalModules.title: Routing and escalation engine
internalModules.description: Determines the right approver chain and escalations.

interfaces.title: Approval inbox
interfaces.description: Manager and approver interface for reviewing and deciding on claims.

brickDependencies.description: Uses policy status to decide approval depth.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Approval Workflow Orchestration.
Reads Trip Policy Guardrails to support domain workflows.
Reads Spend Categorization And Tax Coding to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Budget and Cost Center Controls
bricks.description: Checks spend and trip activity against budgets, cost centers, projects, and approval thresholds.

internalModules.title: Budget control service
internalModules.description: Evaluates budget availability and owner context.

interfaces.title: Budget check API
interfaces.description: Returns budget and ownership validation outcomes.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes cost-center, project, and budget reference data.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Spend Categorization And Tax Coding to support domain workflows.
Reads Approval Workflow Orchestration to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Identity, Roles, and Entity Access
bricks.description: Controls user identity, approver rights, entity scope, and policy visibility across the platform.

internalModules.title: Role and scope service
internalModules.description: Manages user, manager, finance, and admin access scopes.

interfaces.title: Access control API
interfaces.description: Returns permission and visibility decisions for user actions.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes user identity and provisioning data.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Identity Credential to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Access Policy.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

rootGroups.name: Travel and Card Operations
rootGroups.description: Pre-trip, in-trip, and card-backed spend control capabilities.

bricks.name: Travel Booking Hub
bricks.description: Aggregates booking requests, itinerary data, and travel context into a unified trip workflow.

internalModules.title: Trip orchestration service
internalModules.description: Stores trip records and links itineraries to travelers and teams.

interfaces.title: Trip workspace
interfaces.description: Operator and employee interface for viewing trip context and connected spend.

brickDependencies.description: Uses booking and itinerary feed ingestion.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Travel Booking.
Reads Approval Workflow Orchestration to support domain workflows.
Reads Trip Policy Guardrails to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Trip Policy Guardrails
bricks.description: Evaluates trip booking choices and travel expense patterns against route, rate, class, and timing policy.

internalModules.title: Trip policy evaluator
internalModules.description: Applies travel-specific rules to planned and completed trips.

interfaces.title: Trip policy review UI
interfaces.description: Shows policy outcomes and override needs for travel workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Builds travel-specific logic on top of shared policy foundations.
Uses trip and itinerary context during rule evaluation.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.
Writes or updates Transaction during domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Trip Policy Guardrails.

bricks.name: Travel Feed and TMC Connectors
bricks.description: Imports booking, itinerary, ticket, hotel, and trip-status data from travel management companies and booking providers.

internalModules.title: Travel connector framework
internalModules.description: Normalizes travel provider payloads into shared trip events.

interfaces.title: Travel provider sync APIs
interfaces.description: Provider-specific integration surfaces for booking data ingestion.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes trip and itinerary data from partner travel systems.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Travel Booking to support domain workflows.
Reads Trip Policy Guardrails to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Duty of Care and Trip Support
bricks.description: Supports traveler visibility, disruption awareness, and trip-related support escalation.

internalModules.title: Trip status and alert service
internalModules.description: Tracks trip status changes and support-relevant alerts.

interfaces.title: Trip support console
interfaces.description: Operations interface for travel exception and disruption handling.

brickDependencies.description: Uses trip records and itinerary context.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Customer Contact Point to support domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Reads Travel Booking to support domain workflows.
Reads Trip Policy Guardrails to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Corporate Card Program
bricks.description: Supports company card issuance, cardholder controls, and spend instrumentation for employee purchases.

internalModules.title: Card program service
internalModules.description: Maintains cardholder status, controls, and card program metadata.

interfaces.title: Card admin UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for issuing and managing spend cards.

brickDependencies.description: Uses identity and entity scope for cardholder management.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Relies on external financial partners for physical or virtual card rails.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Customer Contact Point to support domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Reads Spend Categorization And Tax Coding to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Card Transaction Reconciliation
bricks.description: Matches card events to receipts, trip records, and expense lines while highlighting unresolved exceptions.

internalModules.title: Transaction matching engine
internalModules.description: Correlates card transactions with expense and receipt evidence.

interfaces.title: Card exception workspace
interfaces.description: Finance interface for reviewing unmatched or disputed card transactions.

brickDependencies.description: Uses captured receipt data in matching decisions.
Matches card events to submitted or draft expense lines.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Card networks and card feed providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes posted and pending transaction data.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.
Writes or updates Transaction during domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Reads Receipt Capture And Ocr to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Card Controls and Limits
bricks.description: Manages spend limits, merchant restrictions, cardholder controls, and temporary overrides.

internalModules.title: Control policy service
internalModules.description: Stores and evaluates card-level control settings.

interfaces.title: Card control API
interfaces.description: Exposes spend-control configurations to card program workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses budget ownership and limits when setting card rules.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Pushes card controls to issuing partners where supported.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Spend Categorization And Tax Coding to support domain workflows.

rootGroups.name: Finance Automation and Intelligence
rootGroups.description: Back-office automation, data movement, and spend insight capabilities.

bricks.name: Reimbursement Orchestration
bricks.description: Turns approved out-of-pocket claims into payable reimbursement instructions and status tracking.

internalModules.description: Tracks payable status, batches, and employee payout visibility.

interfaces.title: Reimbursement status UI
